channel.title: Daily Intelligence Briefing
channel.description: A daily AI-generated intelligence briefing covering markets, technology, and geopolitics — delivered as a two-voice podcast.
channel.itunes:author: Daily Intelligence Briefing
channel.itunes:summary: A daily AI-generated intelligence briefing covering markets, technology, and geopolitics — delivered as a two-voice podcast.
